name: Credit Innovation Group
description_short: Credit Innovation Group is a credit repair provider based in Hildale, Utah. Rated 4.4/5 with 2,269 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Innovation Group is a credit repair provider serving clients in Hildale, Utah. With 2,269 Google reviews and a 4.4/5.0 rating, Credit Innovation Group has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Credit Innovation Group specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Hildale, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Innovation Group operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Hildale, Utah area who are considering Credit Innovation Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
